steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The second sentence explains that parts of the complex were physically inaccessible, which forced researchers to use LiDAR. The blank must introduce a causal transition.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Similarly,": signals a parallel comparison, not a cause-and-effect relationship. ✗
  • "Afterward,": implies time sequence, not causation. ✗
  • "Hence,": means 'therefore' and correctly expresses that physical inaccessibility caused LiDAR to be the only viable method. ✓
  • "Specifically,": narrows or elaborates a point rather than stating a causal result. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
